home.metaDesc: 50+ verified apartments in Bodrum. Daily rentals in Gümbet, Turgutreis, Yalıkavak. Instant booking, free cancellation, 24/7 support. Book now!
home.ogDesc: The most trusted apartment rental platform in Bodrum. Instant booking, price guarantee.
home.heroUpper: Safe and fast apartment rental in Bodrum
home.heroLower: 50+ verified apartments across Gümbet, Turgutreis, Yalıkavak and all Bodrum districts. Instant booking, free cancellation.
home.searchTitle: Find Your Bodrum Apartment in Seconds
home.trust3Desc: Reach us on WhatsApp any time
home.trust4Desc: Full refund up to 7 days before arrival
home.servicesDesc: Plan every piece of your trip on a single platform.
home.districtsDesc: Each district has its own character — find yours.
home.why1Desc: We live in Bodrum and inspect every apartment ourselves. No middlemen — you get info from the owner.
home.why2Desc: Real photos, accurate descriptions. No surprises when you arrive.
home.why3Desc: Free cancellation up to 7 days before arrival. No penalty if plans change.
home.why4Desc: Find the same apartment cheaper elsewhere? We'll match the price.
home.reviewsDesc: Real guest reviews from Booking and Google.
home.blogDesc: Up-to-date articles to help you plan your trip.
home.intro1: When you think of apartment rental in Bodrum, we want to be the name that comes first. From the vibrant beachfront of Gümbet to the boutique marina of Yalıkavak, from the family-friendly shores of Turgutreis to the quiet coves of Bitez — we offer carefully selected apartments in every corner of the peninsula. Every apartment is inspected in person, every photo is real, every price is transparent.
home.intro2: Why an apartment instead of a hotel? Because a holiday is more than just a place to sleep — it's freedom. Breakfast in your own kitchen, sunset from your own balcony, Bodrum at your own pace. Without the constraints of a hotel room, with family or friends, at a much better price. We offer daily, weekly and monthly rental options that fit every budget and every plan.
home.intro3: Wherever you arrive in Bodrum, we're with you. Need a VIP transfer from Milas-Bodrum Airport? Done. Looking for a boat for a blue tour stretching to Marmaris? Our fleet is ready. Want to explore Bodrum on your own with a rental car? We'll find you the best deal. Plan every piece of your trip on a single platform — leave the rest to us.
home.intro4: How does booking work? Enter your dates and number of guests, browse available apartments, pick one and submit the form. Within one hour we'll reach you on WhatsApp or by phone, confirm availability and share payment details. Your booking is complete within minutes. Free cancellation stays valid until 7 days before your arrival.
home.intro5: Local team, local knowledge. We live in Bodrum and we breathe Bodrum. Which beach suits families with children, which restaurant gets the freshest fish, which bay lets you escape the crowds — ask us, we'll guide you. Make your holiday an experience, not just an accommodation.
home.intro6: Start your search now to come to Bodrum at the right time, in the right place, at the right price.

faq.q1: Is renting an apartment in Bodrum cheaper than a hotel?
faq.a1: Usually yes, especially for groups of 4 or more. Per-person cost in a shared apartment is often half of a hotel room. Plus, having your own kitchen saves significantly on dining costs.
faq.a2: After you submit the form, we contact you within an hour via WhatsApp or phone. Once availability is confirmed, we share bank transfer details. Your booking is confirmed as soon as we receive payment, and you'll get a confirmation email.
faq.a3: Cancel 7 or more days before arrival for a full refund. Cancellations within 7 days are subject to a partial fee.
faq.a4: We have apartments in Gümbet, Turgutreis, Yalıkavak, Bitez, Ortakent, Gündoğan and Torba. Each district has its own page with available listings.
faq.a5: Yes. We provide VIP transfer from Milas-Bodrum Airport to your apartment. You can request it during booking or reserve directly from our transfer page.
faq.a6: 3 nights minimum in high season (June–September), 2 nights in other months. Some apartments offer weekly discounts.

boat.metaTitle: Bodrum Boat Rental 2026 | Daily, Blue Cruise & Private Charter
boat.metaDesc: Daily boat tours, blue cruise and private charter in Bodrum. Departures from Yalıkavak, Türkbükü, Bodrum centre. Transparent pricing, captain included.
boat.subtitle: Daily tour, blue cruise, private charter — a boat and route for every budget.
boat.intro1: In Bodrum, a boat isn't part of the holiday — it is the holiday. Watching the peninsula's coves from the sea rather than the shore is a completely different experience. At Bodrumapartkiralama.com we curate daily boat tours, 3-7 day blue cruise packages and private charters under one roof. Vessels are carefully selected; captains are local, insurance is current, inspections are up to date.
boat.intro2: Daily tours depart from Bodrum centre, Yalıkavak and Turgutreis. They cover popular stops like Black Island, Orak Island, Aquarium Cove, Çıralı, Kargı and Meteor. Blue cruise packages stretch into the Gökova Gulf (Sedir Island, Cleopatra Beach, Akbük) or the Datça-Knidos line. For a romantic getaway there is a two-person gulet; for larger groups, a 15-20 guest motor yacht.
boat.intro3: Private charters are ideal for birthdays, proposals, corporate events and sunset cruises. Add-ons such as chef service, sound system, dive gear, or jet skis can be arranged on request. Share your budget and we'll find the right boat.
boat.boatType2Desc: 4-8 cabins, 3-7 nights, full board, fixed or custom route.
boat.boatType3Desc: Hourly or daily, captain + hostess, ideal for sunset cruises.
boat.boatType4Desc: Knidos ancient city, Palamutbükü, Hayıtbükü, Ovabükü.
boat.route1: Bodrum → Black Island → Aquarium Cove → Meteor

car.metaTitle: Bodrum Car Rental 2026 | Airport Delivery, Insurance Included
car.metaDesc: Affordable car rental in Bodrum. Pick up at Milas-Bodrum Airport or town centre. Full insurance, unlimited km, flexible return.
car.subtitle: Airport delivery, full insurance included, unlimited km — transparent pricing.
car.intro1: The most practical way to explore Bodrum at your own pace is a rental car. Public transport is crowded and slow in peak season; taxis quickly add up. With a rental car you'll reach Akyarlar from Yalıkavak or Türkbükü from Bitez in 20-30 minutes. We partner with major rent-a-car providers to offer discounted rates. All vehicles come with full insurance, unlimited mileage, and free airport delivery.
car.intro2: Our fleet covers everything from economy to premium SUV. Compact cars (Fiat Egea, Renault Clio) suit city driving and couples; mid-size sedans (Toyota Corolla, VW Passat) work for families; SUVs (Dacia Duster, Hyundai Tucson) offer extra luggage space; premium cars (BMW 3 Series, Mercedes C) fit business trips or special events.
car.intro3: Pick-up locations: Milas-Bodrum Airport (24/7), Bodrum centre, Yalıkavak, Turgutreis, Bitez. Hotel delivery is free. Return at a different location is possible (e.g. pick up at the airport, return in Yalıkavak). Minimum rental is 1 day; weekly and monthly rentals get a 15-25% discount. Drivers must be 21+ with a valid licence; international or Turkish licences are accepted.
car.carClass1Desc: Fiat Egea, Renault Clio, Hyundai i20. 4 guests + 2 bags.
car.carClass2Desc: Toyota Corolla, Renault Megane. 5 guests + 3 bags, automatic.
car.carClass3Desc: Dacia Duster, Hyundai Tucson. 5 guests + 4 bags, high comfort.
car.carClass4Desc: BMW 3, Mercedes C, Volvo XC60. Luxury interior, premium feel.

transfer.metaTitle: Bodrum Airport Transfer | Milas-Bodrum VIP Transfer 2026
transfer.metaDesc: Milas-Bodrum Airport VIP transfer. Sedan, Vito and Sprinter to Yalıkavak, Gümbet, Turgutreis and all districts. Fixed price.
transfer.subtitle: From Milas-Bodrum Airport to your apartment door in a private vehicle.
transfer.intro1: Milas-Bodrum Airport sits 35 km from Bodrum centre and 50 km from Yalıkavak. The easiest way not to tire your holiday before it starts is a pre-arranged transfer. We provide VIP transfers directly with our local driver team or through partner operators. All vehicles are air-conditioned, fully insured, and include water and Wi-Fi; drivers track your flight and don't charge extra for delays.
transfer.intro2: Vehicle types match your group and luggage. 1-3 guests: sedan (Mercedes E, VW Passat). 4-7 guests: Vito or VW Caravelle. 8-16 guests: Mercedes Sprinter VIP. A baby seat is provided free on request.
transfer.intro3: Prices are fixed by region; you'll get a clear quote at booking. No surcharges at night or in peak periods. One-way or round-trip available; round-trip gets a 10% discount.
transfer.vehicle1Desc: Mercedes E or VW Passat. 3 suitcases.
transfer.vehicle2Desc: Mercedes Vito or VW Caravelle. 6 suitcases.
transfer.vehicle3Desc: Mercedes Sprinter. Wide luggage area, leather seats.

tours.metaTitle: Bodrum Daily Tours 2026 | Blue Cruise, Diving, Jeep Safari
tours.metaDesc: Daily tours in Bodrum: blue cruise, diving, jeep safari, ancient city tours. Local and international tour partners, transparent prices.
tours.subtitle: Blue cruise, diving, jeep safari, ancient cities — the best ways to discover Bodrum.
tours.intro1: If you came to Bodrum for more than the beach, you're in the right place. The peninsula is rich in both nature and history; ancient cities thousands of years old, hidden coves, dive sites and mountain roads await. We work with operators who use local, certified guides. All tours include lunch, insurance and transport.
tours.intro2: The classic blue cruise spends a day on the bays with 3-4 swimming stops and lunch on board. Diving tours suit all levels; no certification is needed for an intro dive. A jeep safari brings you to the peninsula's inland villages, old windmills and panoramic peaks. Ancient city tours cover Bodrum Castle, Mausoleum of Halicarnassus, Pedasa and Knidos.
tours.intro3: Minimum group size per tour is 4-6; individual bookings are grouped with other guests. For a private experience, the entire vehicle or boat can be chartered.
tours.tour2Desc: All levels, no certification needed, 60-min dive.
tours.tour4Desc: Bodrum Castle, Mausoleum, Pedasa with guide.

about.metaTitle: About Us | Local Apartment Rental Team in Bodrum
about.metaDesc: We live on the Bodrum peninsula and inspect every apartment ourselves. Verified listings, transparent pricing, 24/7 support.
about.subtitle: Bodrum's local, trusted apartment rental platform.
about.section1: Bodrumapartkiralama.com was founded by a team that lives and grew up on the Bodrum peninsula. We select, photograph and inspect each apartment ourselves. Before every check-in the team visits — clean linen, working air conditioning, hot water — everything is checked. That's why guests write 'just like the photos' on arrival; no surprises.
about.section2: Bodrum prices shift daily through summer, and most competitors only reveal the real price at the last minute. We list our prices openly as high and low season. No hidden fees or last-minute surprises. Instead of pure online booking we prefer a form + WhatsApp flow, because we want to speak to every guest — the person who will support you on holiday is the same one you talk to before booking.
about.section3: After picking an apartment, whether you need airport transfer, a sunset cruise, or a day of diving for the kids — we arrange it all from one place. With 10+ years on the ground in Bodrum we know which restaurant has fresh fish, which beach stays quiet on holidays, when to visit the local market. Ask us, we'll guide you.
